Main Page | Modules | Namespace List | Class Hierarchy | Alphabetical List | Data Structures | Directories | File List | Namespace Members | Data Fields | Globals | Related Pages | Search for 
apps / utils / dumprecbin

dumprecbin.c

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 /* 
00002  *
00003  *  dumprecbin - dumps a recycle bin database
00004  *
00005  *  Copyright (c) 2005 by Thomas Weidenmueller <w3seek@reactos.com>
00006  *
00007  *  This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify
00008  *  it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by
00009  *  the Free Software Foundation; either version 2 of the License, or
00010  *  (at your option) any later version.
00011  *
00012  *  This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,
00013  *  but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of
00014  *  MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.  See the
00015  *  GNU General Public License for more details.
00016  *
00017  *  You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License
00018  *  along with this program; if not, write to the Free Software
00019  *  Foundation, Inc., 675 Mass Ave, Cambridge, MA 02139, USA.
00020  *
00021  * TODO: - Support for Vista recycle bins (read the DeleteInfo NTFS streams, also NT 5.x)
00022  *       - Support for INFO databases (win95)
00023  */
00024 #include <windows.h>
00025 #include <winternl.h>
00026 #include <sddl.h>
00027 #include <ntsecapi.h>
00028 #include <stdio.h>
00029 #include <ctype.h>
00030 #include <tchar.h>
00031 
00032 #ifndef NT_SUCCESS
00033 #define NT_SUCCESS(status) ((LONG)(status) >= 0)
00034 #endif
00035 
00036 typedef struct _RECYCLE_BIN
00037 {
00038     struct _RECYCLE_BIN *Next;
00039     PSID Sid;
00040     WCHAR User[255];
00041     WCHAR Path[MAX_PATH + 1];
00042 } RECYCLE_BIN, *PRECYCLE_BIN;
00043 
00044 typedef enum
00045 {
00046     ivUnknown = 0,
00047     ivINFO2
00048 } INFO_VERSION, *PINFO_VERSION;
00049 
00050 typedef struct _INFO2_HEADER
00051 {
00052     DWORD Version;
00053     DWORD Zero1;
00054     DWORD Zero2;
00055     DWORD RecordSize;
00056 } INFO2_HEADER, *PINFO2_HEADER;
00057 
00058 typedef struct _INFO2_RECORD
00059 {
00060     DWORD Unknown;
00061     CHAR AnsiFileName[MAX_PATH];
00062     DWORD RecordNumber;
00063     DWORD DriveLetter;
00064     FILETIME DeletionTime;
00065     DWORD DeletedPhysicalSize;
00066     WCHAR FileName[MAX_PATH - 2];
00067 } INFO2_RECORD, *PINFO2_RECORD;
00068 
00069 static HANDLE
00070 OpenAndMapInfoDatabase(IN LPTSTR szFileName,
00071                        OUT PVOID *MappingBasePtr,
00072                        OUT PLARGE_INTEGER FileSize)
00073 {
00074     HANDLE hFile, hMapping = INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE;
00075 
00076     hFile = CreateFile(szFileName,
00077                        FILE_READ_DATA,
00078                        FILE_SHARE_READ,
00079                        NULL,
00080                        OPEN_EXISTING,
00081                        FILE_ATTRIBUTE_HIDDEN | FILE_ATTRIBUTE_SYSTEM,
00082                        NULL);
00083     if (hFile != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE)
00084     {
00085         if (GetFileSizeEx(hFile,
00086                           FileSize) &&
00087             FileSize->QuadPart >= 0xF)
00088         {
00089             hMapping = CreateFileMapping(hFile,
00090                                          NULL,
00091                                          PAGE_READONLY,
00092                                          0,
00093                                          0,
00094                                          NULL);
00095             if (hMapping == NULL ||
00096                 !(*MappingBasePtr = MapViewOfFile(hMapping,
00097                                                   FILE_MAP_READ,
00098                                                   0,
00099                                                   0,
00100                                                   0)))
00101             {
00102                 if (hMapping != NULL)
00103                 {
00104                     CloseHandle(hMapping);
00105                 }
00106                 hMapping = INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE;
00107             }
00108         }
00109         CloseHandle(hFile);
00110     }
00111     
00112     return hMapping;
00113 }
00114 
00115 static VOID
00116 UnmapAndCloseDatabase(IN HANDLE hMapping,
00117                       IN PVOID MappingBasePtr)
00118 {
00119     UnmapViewOfFile(MappingBasePtr);
00120     CloseHandle(hMapping);
00121 }
00122 
00123 static INFO_VERSION
00124 DetectDatabaseVersion(PVOID Header)
00125 {
00126     PINFO2_HEADER Info2 = (PINFO2_HEADER)Header;
00127     INFO_VERSION Version = ivUnknown;
00128 
00129     if (Info2->Version == 5 &&
00130         Info2->Zero1 == 0 &&
00131         Info2->Zero2 == 0 &&
00132         Info2->RecordSize == 0x320)
00133     {
00134         Version = ivINFO2;
00135     }
00136     
00137     return Version;
00138 }
00139 
00140 static BOOL
00141 IsValidRecycleBin(IN LPTSTR szPath)
00142 {
00143     TCHAR szFile[MAX_PATH + 1];
00144     TCHAR szClsId[48];
00145     INFO_VERSION DbVersion = ivUnknown;
00146     
00147     _stprintf(szFile,
00148               _T("%s\\desktop.ini"),
00149               szPath);
00150 
00151     /* check if directory contains a valid desktop.ini for the recycle bin */
00152     if (GetPrivateProfileString(TEXT(".ShellClassInfo"),
00153                                 TEXT("CLSID"),
00154                                 NULL,
00155                                 szClsId,
00156                                 sizeof(szClsId) / sizeof(szClsId[0]),
00157                                 szFile) &&
00158         !_tcsicmp(_T("{645FF040-5081-101B-9F08-00AA002F954E}"),
00159                   szClsId))
00160     {
00161         HANDLE hDb;
00162         LARGE_INTEGER FileSize;
00163         PVOID pDbBase = NULL;
00164 
00165         /* open the database and check the signature */
00166         _stprintf(szFile,
00167                   _T("%s\\INFO2"),
00168                   szPath);
00169         hDb = OpenAndMapInfoDatabase(szFile,
00170                                      &pDbBase,
00171                                      &FileSize);
00172         if (hDb != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE)
00173         {
00174             DbVersion = DetectDatabaseVersion(pDbBase);
00175             UnmapAndCloseDatabase(hDb,
00176                                   pDbBase);
00177         }
00178     }
00179 
00180     return DbVersion != ivUnknown;
00181 }
00182 
00183 static BOOL
00184 OpenLocalLSAPolicyHandle(IN ACCESS_MASK DesiredAccess,
00185                          OUT PLSA_HANDLE PolicyHandle)
00186 {
00187     LSA_OBJECT_ATTRIBUTES LsaObjectAttributes = {0};
00188     NTSTATUS Status;
00189 
00190     Status = LsaOpenPolicy(NULL,
00191                            &LsaObjectAttributes,
00192                            DesiredAccess,
00193                            PolicyHandle);
00194     if (!NT_SUCCESS(Status))
00195     {
00196         SetLastError(LsaNtStatusToWinError(Status));
00197         return FALSE;
00198     }
00199 
00200     return TRUE;
00201 }
00202 
00203 static BOOL
00204 ConvertSIDToAccountName(IN PSID Sid,
00205                         OUT LPWSTR User)
00206 {
00207     DWORD AccountNameLen = 0;
00208     DWORD DomainNameLen = 0;
00209     SID_NAME_USE NameUse;
00210     DWORD Error = ERROR_SUCCESS;
00211     LPWSTR AccountName, DomainName;
00212     BOOL Ret = FALSE;
00213 
00214     if (!LookupAccountSidW(NULL,
00215                            Sid,
00216                            NULL,
00217                            &AccountNameLen,
00218                            NULL,
00219                            &DomainNameLen,
00220                            &NameUse))
00221     {
00222         Error = GetLastError();
00223         if (Error == ERROR_NONE_MAPPED ||
00224             Error != ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_BUFFER)
00225         {
00226             /* some unexpected error occured! */
00227             goto ConvertSID;
00228         }
00229     }
00230     
00231     AccountName = (LPWSTR)HeapAlloc(GetProcessHeap(),
00232                                     0,
00233                                     (AccountNameLen + DomainNameLen) * sizeof(WCHAR));
00234     if (AccountName != NULL)
00235     {
00236         LSA_HANDLE PolicyHandle;
00237         DomainName = AccountName + AccountNameLen;
00238         
00239         if (!LookupAccountSidW(NULL,
00240                                Sid,
00241                                AccountName,
00242                                &AccountNameLen,
00243                                DomainName,
00244                                &DomainNameLen,
00245                                &NameUse))
00246         {
00247             goto BailFreeAccountName;
00248         }
00249         
00250         wcscpy(User,
00251                AccountName);
00252         Ret = TRUE;
00253         
00254         if (OpenLocalLSAPolicyHandle(POLICY_LOOKUP_NAMES | POLICY_VIEW_LOCAL_INFORMATION,
00255                                      &PolicyHandle))
00256         {
00257             PLSA_REFERENCED_DOMAIN_LIST ReferencedDomain;
00258             PLSA_TRANSLATED_NAME Names;
00259             PLSA_TRUST_INFORMATION Domain;
00260             PLSA_UNICODE_STRING DomainName;
00261             PPOLICY_ACCOUNT_DOMAIN_INFO PolicyAccountDomainInfo = NULL;
00262             NTSTATUS Status;
00263             
00264             Status = LsaLookupSids(PolicyHandle,
00265                                    1,
00266                                    &Sid,
00267                                    &ReferencedDomain,
00268                                    &Names);
00269             if (NT_SUCCESS(Status))
00270             {
00271                 if (ReferencedDomain != NULL &&
00272                     Names->DomainIndex >= 0)
00273                 {
00274                     Domain = &ReferencedDomain->Domains[Names->DomainIndex];
00275                     DomainName = &Domain->Name;
00276                 }
00277                 else
00278                 {
00279                     Domain = NULL;
00280                     DomainName = NULL;
00281                 }
00282                 
00283                 switch (Names->Use)
00284                 {
00285                     case SidTypeAlias:
00286                         if (Domain != NULL)
00287                         {
00288                             /* query the domain name for BUILTIN accounts */
00289                             Status = LsaQueryInformationPolicy(PolicyHandle,
00290                                                                PolicyAccountDomainInformation,
00291                                                                (PVOID*)&PolicyAccountDomainInfo);
00292                             if (NT_SUCCESS(Status))
00293                             {
00294                                 DomainName = &PolicyAccountDomainInfo->DomainName;
00295                             }
00296                         }
00297                         /* fall through */
00298 
00299                     case SidTypeUser:
00300                     {
00301                         if (Domain != NULL)
00302                         {
00303                             WCHAR *s;
00304 
00305                             /* NOTE: LSA_UNICODE_STRINGs are not always NULL-terminated! */
00306 
00307                             wcscpy(User,
00308                                    AccountName);
00309                             wcscat(User,
00310                                    L" (");
00311                             s = User + wcslen(User);
00312                             CopyMemory(s,
00313                                        DomainName->Buffer,
00314                                        DomainName->Length);
00315                             s += DomainName->Length / sizeof(WCHAR);
00316                             *(s++) = L'\\';
00317                             CopyMemory(s,
00318                                        Names->Name.Buffer,
00319                                        Names->Name.Length);
00320                             s += Names->Name.Length / sizeof(WCHAR);
00321                             *(s++) = L')';
00322                             *s = L'\0';
00323                         }
00324                         break;
00325                     }
00326 
00327                     case SidTypeWellKnownGroup:
00328                     {
00329                         break;
00330                     }
00331 
00332                     default:
00333                     {
00334                         _ftprintf(stderr,
00335                                   _T("Unhandled SID type: 0x%x\n"),
00336                                   Names->Use);
00337                         break;
00338                     }
00339                 }
00340 
00341                 if (PolicyAccountDomainInfo != NULL)
00342                 {
00343                     LsaFreeMemory(PolicyAccountDomainInfo);
00344                 }
00345 
00346                 LsaFreeMemory(ReferencedDomain);
00347                 LsaFreeMemory(Names);
00348             }
00349 
00350             LsaClose(PolicyHandle);
00351             
00352             if (!NT_SUCCESS(Status))
00353             {
00354                 Ret = FALSE;
00355                 goto BailFreeAccountName;
00356             }
00357         }
00358         else
00359         {
00360 BailFreeAccountName:
00361             HeapFree(GetProcessHeap(),
00362                      0,
00363                      AccountName);
00364             goto ConvertSID;
00365         }
00366     }
00367     
00368 ConvertSID:
00369     if (!Ret)
00370     {
00371         LPWSTR StrSid;
00372         Ret = ConvertSidToStringSidW(Sid,
00373                                      &StrSid);
00374         if (Ret)
00375         {
00376             wcscpy(User,
00377                    StrSid);
00378             LocalFree((HLOCAL)StrSid);
00379         }
00380     }
00381 
00382     return Ret;
00383 }
00384 
00385 static VOID
00386 FreeRecycleBinsList(IN OUT PRECYCLE_BIN *RecycleBinsListHead)
00387 {
00388     PRECYCLE_BIN CurrentBin, NextBin;
00389 
00390     CurrentBin = *RecycleBinsListHead;
00391     while (CurrentBin != NULL)
00392     {
00393         NextBin = CurrentBin->Next;
00394         LocalFree((HLOCAL)CurrentBin->Sid);
00395         HeapFree(GetProcessHeap(),
00396                  0,
00397                  CurrentBin);
00398         CurrentBin = NextBin;
00399     }
00400 
00401     *RecycleBinsListHead = NULL;
00402 }
00403 
00404 static BOOL
00405 LocateRecycleBins(IN LPWSTR szDrive,
00406                   OUT PRECYCLE_BIN *RecycleBinsListHead)
00407 {
00408     TCHAR szRecBinPath[MAX_PATH + 1];
00409     HANDLE FindResult;
00410     WIN32_FIND_DATA FindData;
00411     PRECYCLE_BIN NewBin;
00412     BOOL Ret = FALSE;
00413     
00414     FreeRecycleBinsList(RecycleBinsListHead);
00415     
00416     /*
00417      * search for recycle bins on volumes that support file security (NTFS)
00418      */
00419     _stprintf(szRecBinPath,
00420               _T("%lS\\RECYCLER\\*"),
00421               szDrive);
00422     FindResult = FindFirstFile(szRecBinPath,
00423                                &FindData);
00424     if (FindResult != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE)
00425     {
00426         do
00427         {
00428             if (FindData.dwFileAttributes & FILE_ATTRIBUTE_DIRECTORY &&
00429                 _tcscmp(FindData.cFileName,
00430                         _T("..")) &&
00431                 _tcscmp(FindData.cFileName,
00432                         _T(".")))
00433             {
00434                 PSID Sid;
00435                 
00436                 if (ConvertStringSidToSid(FindData.cFileName,
00437                                           &Sid))
00438                 {
00439                     _stprintf(szRecBinPath,
00440                               _T("%s\\RECYCLER\\%s"),
00441                               szDrive,
00442                               FindData.cFileName);
00443                     if (IsValidRecycleBin(szRecBinPath))
00444                     {
00445                         NewBin = (PRECYCLE_BIN)HeapAlloc(GetProcessHeap(),
00446                                                          HEAP_ZERO_MEMORY,
00447                                                          sizeof(RECYCLE_BIN));
00448                         if (NewBin != NULL)
00449                         {
00450                             _tcscpy(NewBin->Path,
00451                                     szRecBinPath);
00452 
00453                             /* convert the SID to an account name */
00454                             ConvertSIDToAccountName(Sid,
00455                                                     NewBin->User);
00456 
00457                             /* append the recycle bin */
00458                             *RecycleBinsListHead = NewBin;
00459                             RecycleBinsListHead = &NewBin->Next;
00460                             
00461                             Ret = TRUE;
00462                         }
00463                         else
00464                             goto ContinueFreeSid;
00465                     }
00466                     else
00467                     {
00468 ContinueFreeSid:
00469                         LocalFree((HLOCAL)Sid);
00470                     }
00471                 }
00472             }
00473         } while (FindNextFile(FindResult,
00474                               &FindData));
00475 
00476         FindClose(FindResult);
00477     }
00478     
00479     /*
00480      * search for recycle bins on volumes that don't support file security (FAT)
00481      */
00482     _stprintf(szRecBinPath,
00483               _T("%s\\Recycled"),
00484               szDrive);
00485     FindResult = FindFirstFile(szRecBinPath,
00486                                &FindData);
00487     if (FindResult != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE)
00488     {
00489         if (IsValidRecycleBin(szRecBinPath))
00490         {
00491             SID_IDENTIFIER_AUTHORITY WorldSia = {SECURITY_WORLD_SID_AUTHORITY};
00492             PSID EveryoneSid;
00493             
00494             /* create an Everyone SID */
00495             if (AllocateAndInitializeSid(&WorldSia,
00496                                          1,
00497                                          SECURITY_WORLD_RID,
00498                                          0,
00499                                          0,
00500                                          0,
00501                                          0,
00502                                          0,
00503                                          0,
00504                                          0,
00505                                          &EveryoneSid))
00506             {
00507                 NewBin = (PRECYCLE_BIN)HeapAlloc(GetProcessHeap(),
00508                                                  HEAP_ZERO_MEMORY,
00509                                                  sizeof(RECYCLE_BIN));
00510                 if (NewBin != NULL)
00511                 {
00512                     _tcscpy(NewBin->Path,
00513                             szRecBinPath);
00514 
00515                     /* convert the SID to an account name */
00516                     ConvertSIDToAccountName(EveryoneSid,
00517                                             NewBin->User);
00518 
00519                     /* append the recycle bin */
00520                     *RecycleBinsListHead = NewBin;
00521                     RecycleBinsListHead = &NewBin->Next;
00522 
00523                     Ret = TRUE;
00524                 }
00525                 else
00526                     FreeSid(EveryoneSid);
00527             }
00528         }
00529         FindClose(FindResult);
00530     }
00531 
00532     return Ret;
00533 }
00534 
00535 static VOID
00536 DiskFileNameFromRecord(OUT LPTSTR szShortFileName,
00537                        IN DWORD RecordNumber,
00538                        IN WCHAR cDriveLetter,
00539                        IN LPWSTR szFileName)
00540 {
00541     LPWSTR FileExt;
00542     
00543     FileExt = wcsrchr(szFileName,
00544                       L'.');
00545     if (FileExt != NULL)
00546     {
00547         _stprintf(szShortFileName,
00548                   _T("D%lC%d%lS"),
00549                   cDriveLetter,
00550                   RecordNumber,
00551                   FileExt);
00552     }
00553     else
00554     {
00555         _stprintf(szShortFileName,
00556                   _T("D%lC%d"),
00557                   cDriveLetter,
00558                   RecordNumber);
00559     }
00560 }
00561 
00562 static BOOL
00563 DumpRecycleBin(IN PRECYCLE_BIN RecycleBin)
00564 {
00565     WCHAR szFile[MAX_PATH + 1];
00566     HANDLE hDb;
00567     LARGE_INTEGER FileSize;
00568     PVOID pDbBase = NULL;
00569     INFO_VERSION Version = ivUnknown;
00570 
00571     _tprintf(_T("Dumping recycle bin of \"%lS\":\n"),
00572              RecycleBin->User);
00573     _tprintf(_T("Directory: %lS\n\n"),
00574              RecycleBin->Path);
00575 
00576     _stprintf(szFile,
00577               _T("%s\\INFO2"),
00578               RecycleBin->Path);
00579     hDb = OpenAndMapInfoDatabase(szFile,
00580                                  &pDbBase,
00581                                  &FileSize);
00582     if (hDb != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE)
00583     {
00584         Version = DetectDatabaseVersion(pDbBase);
00585 
00586         /* dump the INFO2 database */
00587         switch (Version)
00588         {
00589             case ivINFO2:
00590             {
00591                 DWORD nRecords;
00592                 PINFO2_HEADER Info2Header = (PINFO2_HEADER)pDbBase;
00593                 PINFO2_RECORD Info2 = (PINFO2_RECORD)(Info2Header + 1);
00594                 int i = 0;
00595 
00596                 nRecords = (FileSize.QuadPart - sizeof(INFO2_HEADER)) / Info2Header->RecordSize;
00597                 
00598                 while (nRecords != 0)
00599                 {
00600                     /* if the first character of the AnsiFileName is zero, the record
00601                        is considered deleted */
00602                     if (Info2->AnsiFileName[0] != '\0')
00603                     {
00604                         _tprintf(_T(" [%d] Record: #%d \"%lS\"\n"),
00605                                  ++i,
00606                                  Info2->RecordNumber,
00607                                  Info2->FileName);
00608 
00609                         DiskFileNameFromRecord(szFile,
00610                                                Info2->RecordNumber,
00611                                                (WCHAR)Info2->DriveLetter + L'a',
00612                                                Info2->FileName);
00613                         _tprintf(_T("      Name on disk: \"%s\"\n"),
00614                                  szFile);
00615                         _tprintf(_T("      Deleted size on disk: %d KB\n"),
00616                                  Info2->DeletedPhysicalSize / 1024);
00617                     }
00618                     nRecords--;
00619                     Info2++;
00620                 }
00621                 
00622                 break;
00623             }
00624 
00625             default:
00626                 break;
00627         }
00628 
00629         UnmapAndCloseDatabase(hDb,
00630                               pDbBase);
00631     }
00632 
00633     return FALSE;
00634 }
00635 
00636 static BOOL
00637 SelectRecycleBin(IN LPWSTR szDrive)
00638 {
00639     BOOL Ret;
00640     PRECYCLE_BIN RecycleBinsList = NULL;
00641     
00642     Ret = LocateRecycleBins(szDrive,
00643                             &RecycleBinsList);
00644     if (Ret)
00645     {
00646         if (RecycleBinsList->Next != NULL)
00647         {
00648             PRECYCLE_BIN CurrentBin = RecycleBinsList;
00649             int n = 0, i = 0;
00650 
00651             /* if there are multiple recycle bins ask the user which one to dump */
00652             _tprintf(_T("There are several recycle bins on this drive. Select one:\n"));
00653             
00654             while (CurrentBin != NULL)
00655             {
00656                 _tprintf(_T("  [%d] %lS\n"),
00657                          ++i,
00658                          CurrentBin->User);
00659                 CurrentBin = CurrentBin->Next;
00660                 n++;
00661             }
00662 
00663             _tprintf(_T("Enter the number: "));
00664 DisplayPrompt:
00665             _tscanf(_T("%d"),
00666                     &i);
00667             if (i > n || i < 1)
00668             {
00669                 _tprintf(_T("Please enter a number between 1 and %d: "),
00670                          n);
00671                 goto DisplayPrompt;
00672             }
00673             
00674             /* walk to the selected recycle bin */
00675             CurrentBin = RecycleBinsList;
00676             while (CurrentBin != NULL && i != 1)
00677             {
00678                 CurrentBin = CurrentBin->Next;
00679                 i--;
00680             }
00681             
00682             /* dump it */
00683             Ret = DumpRecycleBin(CurrentBin);
00684         }
00685         else
00686         {
00687             /* dump the first (and only) recycle bin */
00688             Ret = DumpRecycleBin(RecycleBinsList);
00689         }
00690     }
00691     else
00692     {
00693         _ftprintf(stderr,
00694                   _T("No recycle bins on this volume!\n"));
00695     }
00696     
00697     FreeRecycleBinsList(&RecycleBinsList);
00698 
00699     return Ret;
00700 }
00701 
00702 static VOID
00703 PrintHelp(VOID)
00704 {
00705     _ftprintf(stderr,
00706               _T("Usage: dumprecbin C:\n"));
00707 }
00708 
00709 int
00710 main(int argc,
00711      char *argv[])
00712 {
00713     if (argc != 2 ||
00714         strlen(argv[1]) != 2 || argv[1][1] != ':' ||
00715         toupper(argv[1][0]) < 'A' || toupper(argv[1][0]) > 'Z')
00716     {
00717         PrintHelp();
00718         return 1;
00719     }
00720     else
00721     {
00722         WCHAR szDrive[3];
00723         _stprintf(szDrive,
00724                   _T("%lC:"),
00725                   argv[1][0]);
00726 
00727         if (!SelectRecycleBin(szDrive))
00728             return 1;
00729         else
00730             return 0;
00731     }
00732 }
00733
Generated on Thu Nov 3 17:08:20 2005 for ReactOS by  1.3.9.1
